data.name: Sweet Tank
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Tank - 一款坦克自動對戰的遊戲，跟八位漂亮可人女將軍用坦克大戰一場，戰勝後還有另一戰事等著。

本遊戲是坦克自動對戰遊戲，玩家只需派出坦克擊敗女方陣營即可。

- 遊戲有三個等級，玩家可直接挑戰最高難度解鎖一位女將軍的全部內容。(建議是等級一及二先各遊玩一次，解鎖所有坦克後只需玩等級三便可)

在圖庫可按"A","D"或左右方向鍵切換上或下一幅圖

滑鼠滾輪可放大縮細圖片，按著滑鼠左右可拖動圖片

* 圖片大小為 960x1088 px

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Tank
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Tank - A tank auto-battle game where you battle eight beautiful female generals with tanks. After victory, another battle awaits.

This game is an auto-battle tank game where players simply dispatch their tanks to defeat the female generals.

- The game has three levels, and players can directly challenge the highest difficulty to unlock all the content for a female general. (It is recommended to play through levels 1 and 2 once first. Once all tanks are unlocked, play level 3.)

In the gallery, press "A", "D", or the left and right arrow keys to navigate to the previous or next image.

Use the mouse wheel to zoom in and out, and hold down the mouse to drag the image.

* Image size is 960x1088 px.
